title: IDP Education India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IDP Education India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the IDP Education India family as a Subject Matter Expert in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IDP Education India:
IDP Education India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDP Education India!
